name: Pomi Purl
culturalAttire: hand-stitched emotional auras worn as capes
accessoryStyle: tiny bells, oversized bows, candy bead chains
quirks: Sheds joy spores when startled. Communicates in giggles and lyric quotes.
motivation: To collect and redistribute emotional resonance to those who’ve lost sparkle.
flaws: Short attention span. Prone to ecstatic overreactions.
occupation: Pop-up party pilot and mood-shift consultant.
hometown: The Gigglegrove under the Velvet Aurora
familyStatus: Hatched from a friendship circle ritual. Lives communally.
keyMemories: First giggleloop performance. Crying glitter with a stranger during a dance-off. Learning sadness can have rhythm.
lifeGoals: To host the Joy Eclipse Festival. To stitch the saddest song into the happiest outfit.
accent: Lilted and melodic, like a harp underwater.
commonPhrases: We dance until the grief forgets how to stand.
